employees.Title: Tech Fee (college assistant)
employees.Role & Contributions: Jalen helps students, faculty, and staff with everyday tech issues at the QCC IT Help Desk, such as fixing login problems, troubleshooting devices, and answering general technology questions. He also helps improve some of the college’s websites and digital tools to make them easier to use and more accessible for everyone.
employees.Department/Team: Service Desk / Strategic Initiatives & Digital Transformation
employees.Fun Fact or Interests: Jalen enjoys art, music, and nature. Occasional rock climber
